description:
Google DeepMind's highest quality text-to-image model, capable of generating images with great detail, rich lighting, and few distracting artifacts — optimized for short, simple prompts. 

Optional parameters:
Aspect ratio of your image (1:1, 16:9, 9:16, 4:3, 3:4). 

Notes: For more complex prompts, use @Imagen3. Non english input will be translated first. Image prompt cannot exceed 480 tokens.
